questions.question_text: Write a précis of the following passage in about 120 words and also suggest a suitable title: It is in the temperate countries of northern Europe that the beneficial effects of cold are most manifest. A cold climate seems to stimulate energy by acting as an obstacle...

Read the following passage carefully and answer the questions that follow: The third great defect of our civilization is that it does not know what to do with its knowledge. Science has given us powers fit for the gods, yet we use them like small children...
Correct only FIVE of the following: (i) They only work when they have no money. (ii) They left the hotel here they had been staying in a motor-car. (iii) I cannot by no means allow you to do so...
Use punctuation marks where needed in the following sentences: (i) There is a slavery that no legislation can abolish the slavery of caste...
Fill the following blanks (any FIVE) with appropriate preposition: (i) _____ a Ford he has a Fiat car. (a) in (b) before (c) besides (d) despite...

Rewrite the following dialogue, written in direct speech, in a paragraph form. Jack: Hello, Swarup! Swatting away as usual. Come out, man; shut up your old books, and come and have a game of tennis...
Explain the difference between the following word pairs (Any FIVE) by using each word in your own sentences: (i) Callous, Callus, (ii) Born, Borne...
Use ONLY FIVE of the following in sentences which illustrate their meaning: (i) Show and tell, (ii) Helter-skelter...
Translate the following Urdu paragraph into English by keeping in view figurative/idiomatic expressions. ﻻﮨﻮر ﺷﮩﺮ ﺳﯿﺎﺳﺖ ﮨﯽ ﻧﮩﯿﮟ ﺛﻘﺎﻓﺖ ﮐﺎ ﺑﮭﯽ ﻗﺪﯾﻢ ﻣﺮﮐﺰ ﮨﮯ...
